name: Invalid - Too Short Packets
description: Tests packets that are shorter than the minimum required size for their route type.

vectors.description: 1-byte packet (FLOOD): only header, missing path_len and payload
vectors.notes: Minimum FLOOD packet is 3 bytes. This is 1.
Header + path_len present but no payload. i=2, len=2, so i>=len.

vectors.description: 5-byte TRANSPORT_FLOOD: header + transport codes, missing path_len
vectors.notes: TRANSPORT_FLOOD needs at least 7 bytes (1+4+1+1). This has 5.

vectors.description: 6-byte TRANSPORT_FLOOD: header + transport + path_len, missing payload
vectors.notes: All framing present but zero payload.

vectors.description: FLOOD with path consuming all remaining bytes
vectors.notes: header(1) + path_len(1) + path(3) = 5 bytes = total. i=5, len=5.
